  • Summary
    The property with address 15, Felmersham Close, London SW4 7EU is a flat and located on Felmersham Close, which is a cul-de-sac. There are total 2 rooms in the property including 1 bedroom and 1 reception room. The total floor area is 52.00 sq. meters with 1 extensions and D energy performance (EPC) rating. This property comes under Lambeth local authority/council with B council tax band and total council tax charges are £1,168 per year.
